scripts.report:mail: npm run report:generate && npm run mail

scripts.test:tripstacc:idfc:uat: cross-env PROJECT=tripstacc-chrome-UAT CLIENT=IDFC npx playwright test TripStacc/tests
scripts.test:tripstacc:bob:uat:mobile:iphone13:h: cross-env PROJECT=tripstacc-chrome-UAT-mobile-iphone13 CLIENT=BOB HEADED=true npx playwright test TripStacc/tests

cross-env PROJECT=tripstacc-chrome-UAT-mobile-iphone13-Loginpage CLIENT=IDFC HEADED=true npx playwright test TripStacc/tests
